title: BorderControl
description: BorderControl is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that lets server admins smoothly shrink or expand the world border in real-time. It supports action bar updates for players and broadcasts messages when the border changes, making it perfect for events etc
body:
# 🎯 Overview
**BorderControl** is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that lets server admins smoothly shrink or expand the world border in real-time.  
It supports action bar updates for players and broadcasts messages when the border changes. Perfect for events, PvP arenas, or custom game modes.

# ⚙️ Features
- Smoothly shrink or expand the world border
- Action bar updates showing current size
- Broadcast messages for all players
- Simple commands: `/expand <size>` and `/shrink <size>`
- Lightweight and server-friendly

# 📝 Commands

### `/expand <size>`
- Expands the world border to the specified size.
- **Example:** `/expand 200`

### `/shrink <size>`
- Shrinks the world border to the specified size.
- **Example:** `/shrink 50`

**Note:** Players must be OP or have permission to use these commands.

# ⚠️ Warnings / Notes
- Players must be OP or have permission to use `/expand` or `/shrink`.
- Avoid shrinking below 10 blocks, as it may trap players inside.
- Always backup your world before running large border changes.
